title: Naan Kaathirundha Ponnu Lyrics Pazhaya Vannarapettai
stanzas:
Naan kaathirundha ponnu
adhu neethaanaa.
enna iluthupotu adikkum
ponnu neethaanaa

en nenjukulla thudikkum
meen neethaana
un udhadugal inikkum
thaen poo thaanaa.

kaalu rendu thudikkuthadi
kannu rendu alaiyuthadi
mogam etti paakkuthadi
enna vegama thaakkuthadi

idhu enna pudhu noyaa
thaakkuthe enna theeyaa
mogam etti paakkuthadi
vegama thaakkuthadi

Naan kaathirundha ponnu
adhu neethaanaa.
enna iluthupotu adikkum
ponnu neethaanaa

en nenjukulla thudikkum
meen neethaana
un udhadugal inikkum
thaen poo thaanaa.

ava nenjukulla moodi vacha
vishayam theriyudhu
en nenjukuli adhukuthaan
yaengi thavikkudhu

ada avala nenachuthaan
naalum thodanguthu
andha ponna nenachuthaan
naalum mudiyudhu

ava silent enna thaan
violent aakkuthu
en moga mullellaam
mokka aaguthu

idhu kadhalaagumaa
kalandu oadumaa
indha natpu nelaikkuma
kadhal molaikkumaa

ayyaiyayo kadhaladi
valikkudhadi
nenju dhikku dhikku
thudikkuthadi
idhu kadhalunnu
solli vidadadi

idhu enna pudhu noyaa
thaakkuthe enna theeyaa

Naan kaathirundha ponnu
adhu neethaanaa.
enna iluthupotu adikkum
ponnu neethaanaa

en nenjukulla thudikkum
meen neethaana
un udhadugal inikkum
thaen poo thaanaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Naan Kaathirundha Ponnu expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotions associated with romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pazhaya Vannarapettai, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards their beloved, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The singer and music director for Naan Kaathirundha Ponnu are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 2, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Kaathirundha Ponnu, the lyrics beautifully articulate the feelings of love and desire, making it a standout romantic melody in Pazhaya Vannarapettai. The song captures the essence of longing, evoking emotions that resonate with anyone who has experienced love. Its soothing tune and heartfelt expressions create a nostalgic atmosphere, perfect for intimate moments. Overall, it serves as a poignant reminder of the beauty and complexity of romantic relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Kaathirundha Ponnu from Pazhaya Vannarapettai captures the essence of longing and romance with its heartfelt lyrics. The song's soothing melody resonates deeply, making it a perfect choice for lovers and nostalgic souls alike. Experience the magic of this enchanting track that beautifully conveys the emotions of love and yearning.
stanzaMeanings: Is that girl I was waiting for really you? Is that girl who will hurt me really you?
The fish that beats in my heart, is it you? Your hugs are like sweet flowers, right?
My two legs are shaking, my two eyes are fluttering, my heart is racing, and I am looking at you eagerly.
What is this new pain? Is it a fire? My heart is racing, and I am looking at you eagerly.
Is that girl I was waiting for really you? Is that girl who will hurt me really you?
The fish that beats in my heart, is it you? Your hugs are like sweet flowers, right?
She knows what is in her heart, and that is why my heart is troubled.
I have been thinking about her, and it has started again; thinking about that girl has become endless.
She is silent, but it makes me feel violent; all my feelings are turning into nonsense.
Is this love? Is it going to last? Will this friendship turn into love tomorrow?
Oh no, love is growing; my heart is beating fast, and this is called love, so don't let it go.
What is this new pain? Is it a fire?
Love is racing, and I am looking at you eagerly.
Is that girl I was waiting for really you? Is that girl who will hurt me really you?
The fish that beats in my heart, is it you? Your hugs are like sweet flowers, right?
